title: Amazon South Africa brings big-city shopping to George
description: GEORGE NEWS - Amazon South Africa invites...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Amazon South Africa invites its customers in George to experience its delivery options, selection and great deals ahead of the upcoming busy shopping season.


> Amazon's fast delivery services promise next-day delivery on thousands of items, bringing big-city shopping convenience directly to local doorsteps.


"Living in George means enjoying the Garden Route's beauty and community spirit, but sometimes finding specific products locally can be challenging," said Robert Koen, Amazon's Managing Director, sub-Saharan Africa.

"We're eliminating that compromise by bringing thousands of incredible deals on products within reach of George residents, all deliverable to their homes within one to two days."

Local shoppers can shop thousands of products, including electronics, books, home goods, beauty products and everyday essentials, from Monday to Friday, and experience Amazon's fast, reliable delivery speeds.

The convenience extends beyond just product availability - Amazon's customer service, hassle-free returns and competitive pricing are accessible to all shoppers without additional travel costs or time spent driving to faraway shopping centres.

Multiple pick-up points located throughout George add an extra layer of convenience as customers can choose a delivery option that best fits their schedules and preferences.


> "Living outside major metros shouldn't mean limited shopping options," added Koen.


"Our presence in communities like George reflects our commitment to serving all South Africans, regardless of their postal code."

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
